memberdef.argsstring: (const rgbd::Image *image, const geo::Pose3D &sensor_pose, const ed::WorldModel &wm, const ed::UUID &entity_id, const double max_yaw_change, const Fitter &fitter, geo::Pose3D &new_pose)
memberdef.name: fitSupportingEntity

parameterdescription.para: pose of the camera when the image was taken
id of the entity that will be fitted

memberdef.argsstring: (const geo::DepthCamera &rasterizer, const geo::Pose3D &cam_pose, const ed::WorldModel &wm, cv::Mat &depth_image)
memberdef.name: renderImage

briefdescription.para: renderImage renders an rgbd image from a world model. N.B.: copied from https://github.com/tue-robotics/fast_simulator/blob/master/src/Kinect.cpp
setupRasterizer sets up the rasterizer N.B.: shouldn't we move this somewhere else? It's being used more often
